Headline: CEO at ECO Technology EPS | Helping UAE Facilities Achieve 100% Environmental Compliance | Grease Trap & Waste Management Solutions.
Summary: Founder & CEO, Eco Technology Environmental Protection Services (Eco-Tech UAE)Robin Edwan is a visionary entrepreneur and sustainability leader who has pioneered circular economy solutions across the UAE since founding Eco-Tech UAE in 2016. With certified partnerships alongside Ajman and Fujairah municipalities, he has transformed waste management into a profitable, scalable model that delivers measurable environmental and economic outcomes.A champion of Public-Private-Academic Partnerships (PPAP), Robin drives innovation through strategic collaborations with government, academia, and industry directly advancing UAE Vision 2030 sustainability imperatives while creating local jobs and operational efficiencies. His expertise spans waste-to-value systems, environmental project management, regulatory compliance, and circular economy integration.Robin is a sought-after speaker on turning policy into practice, inspiring audiences to convert sustainability conversations into tangible impact.
